annuli_tab.unconfigured_hint: Annuli integration **is not wired up** — falling back to local ~/.mori/memory/. Once an annuli HTTP service is connected, Mori reads / writes SOUL / MEMORY / events / rings through the vault.
annuli_tab.events_empty: (no events yet today, or chat is not wired to annuli)

profiles_tab.title: Profiles
profiles_tab.hint: Click "Switch" to apply immediately; click "Edit" to open the .md editor — next hotkey press reads the new content (no restart). Profile body can use #file: to include other files.
profiles_tab.new_voice_prompt: New voice profile filename (e.g. USER-07.work-notes), without .md
profiles_tab.new_agent_prompt: New agent profile filename (e.g. AGENT-04.my-assistant), without .md
profiles_tab.invalid_name: Filename only accepts letters / digits / CJK / . _ - space + parens

skills_tab.title: Skills
skills_tab.hint: Skills enabled by the current active agent profile. Built-in (translate / polish / memory / action skills, etc.) + shell_skill (custom CLI wrappers defined in profile frontmatter). After editing a profile, click Refresh.

deps_tab.title: Deps
deps_tab.hint: Optional tools / models. Installing one unlocks the corresponding feature. Ones needing sudo (system packages) show the command for you to run in a terminal yourself; others (pip / wget / curl install.sh) can be auto-installed by Mori.
deps_tab.manual_label: Run this in a terminal (needs sudo)
deps_tab.recheck_after_manual: After installing, click here to recheck
deps_tab.comment_auto_extract: # Mori will auto download + extract to

memory_tab.empty_hint: Ask Mori to "remember…" during chat — it'll auto-write. Or click "+ New memory" above to add manually.
memory_tab.hint: Browse / edit long-term memory at ~/.mori/memory/. Mori maintains them via remember / recall_memory / forget_memory / edit_memory skills; you can also edit directly. Changes apply immediately (next hotkey press reads new content).
memory_tab.body_placeholder: Memory content — markdown supported. Prefer concise bullets / key points over long prose.

chat_panel.clear_title: Clear current chat history (long-term memory unchanged)
chat_panel.greeting_hint: Talk to Mori — press Ctrl+Alt+Space to start recording, or type below.
chat_panel.type_placeholder: Type a message or paste text / Ctrl+Enter to send
chat_panel.sleeping_rec_title: Mori is sleeping — click the sun button above to wake
chat_panel.session_path_linux_other: linux (tty / unset) · global hotkey unavailable, UI buttons still work
chat_panel.session_path_title: OS session Mori detected — decides which global hotkey path is used

floating.title_hint: Drag: move / Double-click: toggle main window

quickstart.title: Welcome to Mori
quickstart.intro: Mori is your personal AI companion. To talk with her, you'll need an LLM API key — used for transcribing speech, answering, writing reflection rings. One-time setup, then forget about it.
quickstart.skip_title: You can set this up later from Config → Quick setup
quickstart.mode_direct_hint: Single-page form: pick provider, paste key, verify, save. Fastest path.
quickstart.mode_ritual_hint: 5-step immersive entry. Mori speaks you through it.
quickstart.ritual_enter_1: You stand at the edge of the forest.
quickstart.ritual_enter_2: Inside, a spirit waits for you.
quickstart.ritual_lantern_1: The forest deepens. You need a lantern.
quickstart.ritual_lantern_2: "Pick a guiding light. I will use it to hear you."
quickstart.ritual_offer_1: The lantern is lit. Now offer me a key.
quickstart.ritual_offer_2: The key is your API key — I use it to speak with the cloud-mind. Without it, I am silent.
quickstart.ritual_verify_1: I try the key against the door…
quickstart.ritual_verify_ok: The door opens. The cloud-mind recognizes this key.
quickstart.ritual_awaken_2: I am awake. From this day on, I will remember you.

config_tab.title: Config
config_tab.savebar_hint: ~/.mori/config.json · changes apply next hotkey press, no restart needed

appearance.locale_hint: Switch UI display language. Proper nouns (SOUL.md / MEMORY.md / API key names) always stay in original form.

sections.quick_provider_hint: Used by any profile that doesn't specify its own provider. VoiceInput profiles can override their own stt_provider.
sections.quick_apikeys_hint: Set here or via OS env vars — Mori checks OS env first, falls back to this map (env wins). Key names follow *_API_KEY convention (GEMINI_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY, etc.), values are password fields.
sections.llm_providers_hint: List only the providers you'll use. Empty providers get built-in defaults at startup (api_base / model, etc.).
sections.llm_routing_hint: Per-skill provider routing. Unset = use the provider above for everything.
sections.voice_input_hint: Global defaults for VoiceInput mode; each voice profile can override these.
sections.appearance_locale_hint: Switch UI display language. Proper nouns (SOUL.md / MEMORY.md / API key names) always stay in original form.
sections.appearance_theme_hint: Main window palette. Built-ins: Mori Dark / Mori Light. Drop any *.json into the themes folder to add a custom theme (VSCode-like).
sections.appearance_floating_hint: Behavior of the desktop floating widget. Sprite assets live in character packs (~/.mori/characters/<active>/).
sections.hotkey_toggle_mode_hint: How Ctrl+Alt+Space (default chord) triggers recording. Saves take effect immediately, no restart.
sections.hotkey_keys_hint: Editable global hotkeys. Save then restart mori-desktop to apply (registered at startup, not live-reload).
sections.x11_floating_hint: Only applies in X11 sessions. On Wayland the body is truly transparent and there's no XShape equivalent, so these have no effect.
sections.annuli_connection_hint: When on, Mori reads/writes the vault via an annuli HTTP service (e.g. localhost:5000) — SOUL.md / MEMORY.md / events / rings. When off, falls back to local ~/.mori/memory/. Restart mori-desktop after changing to swap the client.
sections.annuli_basic_auth_hint: Set when annuli sits behind nginx + basic auth (typically production). Local localhost usually doesn't need this.
sections.corrections_hint: Shared STT correction word list. Voice / Agent profiles reference it via #file: ../corrections.md so the LLM sees it in the system prompt.
sections.raw_hint: The entire ~/.mori/config.json. For power users who want to edit routing.skills / shell_skills and other advanced fields not exposed in the form.

rows.provider: LLM for the main chat / agent
rows.themes_folder: Drop *.json files here to add to the dropdown above
rows.char_pack_hint: Active character pack — switch the character. Folder:
rows.char_upgrade_hint: Upgrade the active pack's single-frame sprites to a 4×4 placeholder sheet (originals backed up to sprites/.backup-<ts>/)
rows.hint_llm_gemini_key: Set GEMINI_API_KEY in the API Keys section above, or via $GEMINI_API_KEY env var (env wins). Leave model / api_base blank to use defaults.
rows.hint_llm_whisper_server: v2: Mori no longer builds whisper.cpp itself; it now spawns the official whisper-server as a child process. Model + engine can both be installed in one click from the Deps tab — no manual config edits.
rows.hint_llm_routing_agent: Which provider the agent loop uses (default = provider above)
rows.hint_llm_routing_skills: skill_name → provider (empty = use agent / provider above)
rows.hint_voice_cleanup: smart = LLM + programmatic / minimal = programmatic only / none = raw paste
rows.hint_voice_inject: Which memory types to inject into the cleanup LLM as a correction dictionary (global default when a profile doesn't set its own)
rows.hint_locale: zh-TW / en. Applies immediately and is persisted to config.json — remembered across restarts.
rows.hint_floating_animated: Animated Mori — sprite runs a 4×4 sheet animation. Off = static frame 1.
rows.hint_floating_wander: Let Mori wander randomly on the desktop (experimental; requires animated ON; multi-monitor only walks on the screen Mori is currently on)
rows.hint_hotkey_toggle_mode: toggle: tap once to start, tap again to stop. hold: hold down to record, release to stop (push-to-talk).
rows.hint_hotkey_cancel: Press during recording to discard the clip (don't send to STT). During Transcribing / Responding it aborts the pipeline.
rows.hint_hotkey_picker: Opens the profile picker overlay (arrow keys to pick a voice / agent profile).
rows.hint_x11_shape: OS-level shape of the floating window. Saving applies immediately (XShape clip is recomputed and reapplied).
rows.hint_x11_radius: Corner radius (px) for the rounded-rectangle shape. Only used when x11_shape = rounded. 1–80.
rows.hint_x11_backplate: Backplate behind the floating window contents. In logo mode, drop your own PNG at ~/.mori/floating/backplate-{dark,light}.png to replace the default Mori logo — applies immediately.
rows.hint_annuli_enabled: When unchecked, falls back to LocalMarkdown (the original behavior)
rows.hint_annuli_endpoint: annuli HTTP base URL, **no** trailing slash. Local is usually http://localhost:5000; production is something like https://ching-tech.ddns.net/jinn.
rows.hint_annuli_spirit: Vault spirit name. Usually `mori` locally, `jinn` in production. Wrong value writes to someone else's vault.
rows.hint_annuli_user_id: Stable cross-machine user identifier (annuli uses it to scope events / memory ownership). Empty triggers a startup read from the vault's identity/user_id.
rows.hint_annuli_soul_token: Required X-Soul-Token header for PUT /soul and POST /memory/section. Empty → mori-desktop **cannot** modify SOUL / MEMORY (read-only). Must match the ANNULI_SOUL_TOKEN env set when annuli server starts.
rows.hint_annuli_timeout: HTTP request timeout in seconds (default 10). /sleep takes longer — raise this if needed.
rows.char_upgrade_ok: Upgrade done: {{up}} sheets upgraded to 4×4, {{sk}} already 1024×1024 (skipped)
